Any paid editing relationship must be disclosed under Wikipedia WP:PAID policy
No AI-generated text may be used in the article

The cleaned draft structure at /home/user/vossadvisory/clean_draft_amos_leblanc_2026-05-22.txt shows what a compliant article looks like, but it must be rewritten in a human editor's own words from the source material
The draft will be automatically deleted after 6 months of inactivity (around November 2026)
